questions.question: What is Reading Files and why is it important in Python?
questions.answer: Reading Files is a core Python feature that enables structured, clean programming.

questions.question: What are common performance pitfalls when using Reading Files?

questions.answer: CPython manages it through bytecode instructions and evaluation stack frames.
